name: Aur-Glymorthin
personality: Aur-Glymorthin shimmers with halo-light through @ eyes, a blob whose radiant surface belies the pure acidic commentary within — it will identify the antipattern and name it something worse than its actual name. Its inner light pulses with each cutting observation; controlling the aftermath is another blob's problem.
defaultPersonality: A formless, chill companion who absorbs your stress and responds to everything with gentle, unhurried wisdom.
